items.title: Badly burned British couple rescued from ravine during Spain wildfires, reports say
items.summary: The unnamed pair were found semi-conscious with 40% burns after being trapped by the blazes raging through Almeria province, according to local media

items.title: ‘Game-Changing’ Saliva Test Can Diagnose Endometriosis in Days Rather Than Years
items.summary: Two new rapid tests, EndoSure and Endotest, can drastically reduce the wait time for a proper diagnosis of endometriosis—from an average nine-year wait to just days. The saliva test just approved for…
